{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/professional-colleague-agents-ru/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. professional-colleague-agents-ru

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [00-abstract.md|00-abstract.md] — 
* [01-pyat-tipov.md|01-pyat-tipov.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [02-chto-delaet-pka.md|02-chto-delaet-pka.md] — > [!TIP]
* [03-keys-obuchay.md|03-keys-obuchay.md] — 
* [04-arkhitektura.md|04-arkhitektura.md] — 
* [05-ekonomika.md|05-ekonomika.md] — 
* [06-riski.md|06-riski.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [07-oblasti-primeneniya.md|07-oblasti-primeneniya.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [08-pilot-sgb-kolega.md|08-pilot-sgb-kolega.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [09-svyaz-s-drugimi.md|09-svyaz-s-drugimi.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [10-otkrytye-voprosy.md|10-otkrytye-voprosy.md] — 
* [11-prizyv-k-sotrudnichestvu.md|11-prizyv-k-sotrudnichestvu.md] — 
* [12-zaklyuchenie.md|12-zaklyuchenie.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/representative-agent-layer-ru/README.md] (сходство 0.27)
* [README|docs/nautilus/ingit-cowork-ru/README.md] (сходство 0.20)
* [README|docs/nautilus/professional-colleague-agents-en/README.md] (сходство 0.18)
